case_title: JOHNSON, JUANITA E. vs. STANSBERRY, SHIRLEY et al

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, JUANITA E. AS TO DEFENDANT STANSBERRY, SHIRLEY STANSBERRY, RHONDA
